name: Vietnamese Five Spice Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Place chicken thighs in a large, oven-safe dish.
3. Mix together five spice powder, salt, black pepper, star anise, cloves, and cinnamon in a small bowl.
4. Rub mixture onto each chicken thigh, ensuring they are well coated.
5. Roast the chicken for 25-30 minutes or until internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
6. Remove from oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
